creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Note that submitter has been asked for feedback. 

Note that kernel compile failures should generally be posted on the 
mailing lists.  Build failures tend to get fixed very quickly due to 
the high number of developers who track the latest code, and the 
automated tinderboxes that continually run builds.  The fact that 
we're not seeing reports from the tinderboxes suggests that you have 
a local problem.
